data.content:
[2026-03-09T08:26:41Z] cartine: Plan:
- Inspect the current README and any existing image assets to determine whether the screenshots need replacement or whether a new image section is required.
- Capture a fresh set of UI screenshots from http://localhost:3210/beats?repo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery using Playwright/headless Chrome, avoiding the version of the page that renders the bottom-left next button.
- Produce both larger screenshots and smaller thumbnail assets from those captures, add them under a repository-owned docs/images path, and update README.md to reference the new images.
- Verify the README renders correctly, keep edits focused, and avoid touching unrelated workspace changes.
